name: Geometric Terrafab Accent Table Brown - Threshold™
description:
Instantly refresh your outdoor entertainment space with this Geometric Terrafab Accent Table from Threshold™. Featuring a cylindrical silhouette with a footed base, this accent table has a striking geometrical design and a hand-painted finish that works well with a range of decor schemes. It's crafted from magnesium oxide with weather-resistant qualities, so it stands up to all seasons. Place this accent table next to a sofa or between two patio chairs for displaying decor or holding drinks and snacks.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
